content: TASK-079 checkpoint done: synchronized the localhost dev playground with the 0.1.1 release sample. `index.html` now uses the same lightweight checkout screenflow seed as `examples/demo.html`, including Overview/Layer/Prototype coverage and all Add info surfaces, plus the newer toolbar labels, fit SVG CSS, and Prototype loading behavior while retaining dev-time `/src/...` imports. Verification: npm run typecheck, seed parse/render check for index.html and examples/demo.html across overview/layer/prototype with all overlays, npm run build. Remaining release work: manual browser smoke on localhost/file demo/GitHub Pages, publish 0.1.1 to npm, create/push v0.1.1 tag, verify jsDelivr URLs.
